caption: The video features a presentation titled "Industrial Machine Learning: Horizontally Scalable Data Pipelines with Airflow" by Alejandro Saucedo, as part of the EuroPython conference in Edinburgh from July 23-29, 2018. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is delivering his talk to an audience. He gestures with his right hand while speaking, indicating he is explaining or emphasizing a point related to the topic. The slide displayed on the screen includes a network diagram, symbolizing the interconnected nature of data pipelines and machine learning processes. The setting suggests a professional and educational environment focused on advanced data science techniques.
